create_event.title: Create New Event
create_event.errorMsg: Failed to create event. Please try again later.

auth_users.title: Login Account Management
auth_users.adminNote: Admin is the system's highest privilege account and can only be created via the server. The following are general users whose accessible events and functions can be configured.

auth_user_add.title: Add User
auth_user_add.note: After creating, please go to 'Set Permissions' to configure accessible events and functions.

auth_user_edit.title: Set Permissions
auth_user_edit.allowedEventsNote: Check the events this user can access; unchecked events will be inaccessible.
auth_user_edit.noEvents: No events yet. Please create an event before setting permissions.
auth_user_edit.functionsNote: For each checked event, select which functions this user can use.

prize_list.title: Prize Management
prize_list.excelNote:
Please upload an Excel file with the following columns:
- name (Prize name, required)
- unit (Quantity, required, number)
- picture (Image URL, optional)
prize_list.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this prize?
prize_list.noPrizes: There are no prizes to delete
prize_list.deleteAllWarn:
⚠️ Warning: You are about to delete all {count} prize(s)!

This action cannot be undone. Please confirm you want to proceed.
prize_list.deleteAllConfirm:
Confirm again: Are you sure you want to delete all {count} prize(s)?

This action cannot be undone!
prize_list.deleteAllFinal:
Final confirmation: Do you really want to delete all {count} prize(s)?

Type "confirm delete" in the next prompt to complete this action.
prize_list.deleteAllPrompt: Please type "confirm delete" to confirm deleting all {count} prize(s):

create_prize.title: Add Prize
create_prize.imageUrlNote: If you upload an image file, this URL will be ignored

edit_prize.title: Edit Prize
edit_prize.imageUrlNote: If you upload an image file, this URL will be ignored

import_users.title: Import Guests
import_users.desc: You can only import columns that exist in the current registration form. Use the column names below as the first row (headers) in your Excel file.
import_users.importRule: Import rule: if a row has _id and matches an existing guest, that guest will be updated; if _id is empty, a new guest will be created.
import_users.noFields: This event does not have any visible form fields. Please configure the registration form before importing guests.
import_users.downloadCurrent: Download Current Guest List for Modify

luckydraw_setting.title: Lucky Draw Settings
luckydraw_setting.awardPasswordDesc: Once set, visitors opening the Award List page will need to enter this password. Leave empty for no password.
luckydraw_setting.passwordSet: Password already set (modify below and save to change)

luckydraw_game_config.title: Lucky Draw Game Config
luckydraw_game_config.desc: This config is used by the Lucky Draw frontend. After saving, the frontend can retrieve it via API.
luckydraw_game_config.note: You can edit the JSON. Note: api.serverUrl and api.eventId will be auto-filled by the API; you can leave them empty or use defaults here.

guest_list.title: Guest List
guest_list.noteBody: Guest List is a pre-prepared list of guests who have not yet registered through RSVP. You can add them to the RSVP list.
guest_list.importNote1: First row must contain headers: Name, Email, Company, Phone
guest_list.selectRoleNote: You can select multiple roles, or select All Roles to send to everyone
guest_list.confirmAddToRsvp: Are you sure you want to add this guest to RSVP list?
guest_list.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this guest?
guest_list.sendSmsFailed: Failed to send SMS, please try again later
guest_list.addFailed: Failed to add guest. Please try again.
guest_list.updateFailed: Failed to update guest. Please try again.
guest_list.importFailed: Failed to import guests. Please check the file format.

luckydraw_winners.title: Winners List
luckydraw_winners.displayFieldsDesc: Check the fields to display in List / Award / Export. Refresh the Award page after saving to sync.
luckydraw_winners.noFormConfig: No FormConfig fields loaded. Please configure the form in Registration Page Config. Using defaults: Name, Company, Table.
luckydraw_winners.columnsSaved: Saved. Please refresh this page to update the table.
luckydraw_winners.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one field
luckydraw_winners.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the winner record for {name}?
luckydraw_winners.confirmResetOrder:
Reset Winner No to the current maximum in the list.
The next draw will use that number + 1 (e.g. after deleting #4 and resetting, next draw will be #4).

Confirm?
luckydraw_winners.confirmDeleteAll:
⚠️ Warning: Are you sure you want to delete all draw records?

This action cannot be undone!
luckydraw_winners.confirmDeleteAllFinal:
⚠️ Final confirmation: Do you really want to delete all draw records?

All winner records will be permanently deleted!

luckydraw_panel.resetWinnerNote: After reset, next number = max in list + 1 (e.g. after deleting #4 and resetting, next draw will be #4)
luckydraw_panel.sessionNote: This list shows winners added during this session only. See "Luckydraw List" for full records.
luckydraw_panel.confirmCancelWinner: Are you sure you want to cancel the win for {name}?
luckydraw_panel.outOfStock: Selected prize is out of stock!
luckydraw_panel.insufficientStock: Insufficient prize stock. You can only draw {n} at most.
luckydraw_panel.cancelLastNoWinner: There is no winner to cancel.
luckydraw_panel.resetOrderConfirm: Reset Winner No to the current maximum in the list. The next draw will start from that number + 1 (fills gaps from deleted records). Confirm?
luckydraw_panel.controllerReady: Controller ready. You can start drawing.
luckydraw_panel.participantNotFound: Selected participant not found. They may have already won or are not on the list.
